title: Kannukulla Song Lyrics Kaala Koothu
stanzas:
Kannukull vachirukken
nenjukulla thachiirukken
moochu kaathil
naan kalakka vaareney

enna kollum un nenappa
ullukulla bathiramaa
serthuvachi sothezhudhi
thaareney

adiyoda en manasa
madiyoda saaichavalae
inga enkkitta irukkum
usuraiyumthaan
adi ippodhe unakku
thaaren vaariye..

Kannukull vachirukken
nenjukulla thachiirukken
moochu kaathil
naan kalakka vaareney

enna kollum un nenappa
ullukulla bathiramaa
serthuvachi sothezhudhi
thaareney

Unna naan suthi paakkanume
sokkithaan nethi verkanume
enga un buthi poguratho
enna nee konjam aala vidu

aasaiyaa nerungayila
lesa nee odhunguriye
naan unna serndhidum
nerathula
nam thooramum
aadume thoorathule
thulir vedura nenje eerathula
neeyum kanneera
sindhina naanum vaaduven

en Kannukul vachirukken
nenjukulla thachiirukken
moochu kaathil
naan kalakka vaareney

enna kollum un nenappa
ullukulla bathiramaa
serthuvachi sothezhudhi
thaareney

ahh pothi naan vachcha
asaiyellaam
moththam nee thandhaa
theerumadaa

paasamaa moraikkuriye
kovamaa anaikkuriye
en kannu nee ena
aanapinna
naan paakkuren verenna
aanum pennu
enga pogaiyilim neeyum
venumnu
indha jenmathil
unmaththam unmel aaguren

adiyoda en manasa
madiyoda saaichavalae
inga enkkitta irukkum
usuraiyumthaan
adi ippodhe unakku
thaaren vaariye..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the theme of the Kannukulla song?

The song is a romantic melody that expresses deep affection and longing between lovers.

Who are the singers of Kannukulla?

The song is sung by Sathya Prakash and Sharanya Srinivas.

Who composed the music for Kaala Koothu?

The music for Kaala Koothu was composed by Justin Prabhakaran.

What is the release year of Kaala Koothu?

The movie Kaala Koothu was released in 2017.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Kannukulla from the movie Kaala Koothu is a romantic duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. Sung by Sathya Prakash and Sharanya Srinivas, the melody is soothing and evokes a sense of warmth and affection. The lyrics convey a deep emotional connection between the lovers, making it perfect for romantic occasions. Justin Prabhakaran's composition adds a magical touch, enhancing the overall feel of the song.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Experience the enchanting melody of Kannukulla from the movie Kaala Koothu. This romantic duet, beautifully rendered by Sathya Prakash and Sharanya Srinivas, is a testament to Justin Prabhakaran's musical genius. Let the soothing tunes and heartfelt lyrics captivate your senses.
stanzaMeanings: I've kept you in my eyes, hidden you in my heart, I'm coming to mix my breath with yours.
What will your thoughts do to me? I've safely kept them inside, I'll write my fate and give it to you.
With my feet, my heart is swaying, the life I have, I'll give it to you now.
I've kept you in my eyes, hidden you in my heart, I'm coming to mix my breath with yours.
What will your thoughts do to me? I've safely kept them inside, I'll write my fate and give it to you.
I want to look around you, my forehead sweats with excitement, where is your mind wandering? Let me be free for a while.
As I come closer with desire, you move away slightly, when we meet, even our distance dances, in this distance, my heart sprouts, in this pain, you shed tears, and I wither away.
I've kept you in my eyes, hidden you in my heart, I'm coming to mix my breath with yours.
What will your thoughts do to me? I've safely kept them inside, I'll write my fate and give it to you.
When I look up, I don't see anything, but my heart is filled with desire.
All the desires I've kept, you fulfill them completely.
You speak with love, embrace with anger, what have you done to my eyes? I look at you, what else can happen? Wherever I go, I want you, in this life, I'm going crazy for you.
What will your thoughts do to me? I've safely kept them inside, I'll write my fate and give it to you.
With my feet, my heart is swaying, the life I have, I'll give it to you now.
